/usr/bin/g++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/untitled.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/untitled.dir/untitled_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/untitled.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/untitled.dir/device.cpp.o CMakeFiles/untitled.dir/korshun.cpp.o CMakeFiles/untitled.dir/drofa.cpp.o CMakeFiles/untitled.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/untitled.dir/untitled_autogen/EWIEGA46WW/qrc_qml.cpp.o -o untitled  /usr/lib/libQt6Quick.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Qml.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.0
